subcodes.first_line: O family of that sincere servant of the Divine Lord! Praise be to God, ye have a father who is enraptured and enchanted with love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خاندان آن بنده صادق حضرت یزدان الحمد لله پدری دارید سرگشته و سودائی و بمحبت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God
